name: cpig-bool-refactor-11-phase8-frommesh
description: PHASE 8 verification using _CPigFromMesh (BVH-procedural) — the operator's reported scene pattern (libfive sphere ∪ procedural mesh-distance field). BVH evaluation is cheap per eval (vs libfive interpretation that timed out test 10's smooth bake), so the 32³ voxel bake of the mesh-distance leaf finishes inside Canary's agent timeout. Flow: _MeshSphere creates a Rhino mesh sphere → _CPigFromMesh picks it → adds a Kind::PROCEDURAL FieldWrapper. Then a libfive _CPigSphere. Then _CPigUnion — the boolean's mixed-type FieldWrappers → Phase 1 Kind::UNION structured composite → Phase 3 N_LEVELSETS_PLUS_OPTREE export emits ONE LevelSet per leaf (libfive sphere as implicitfunction + procedural mesh as functionfromimage3d) + the optree.json sidecar. Phase 4-7 chain feeds Phase 5's GLSL marcher to compose per-fragment. Expected: gl.scene.loaded with atoms:2, mixed reps (e.g. "tape,atlasBaked"), "pushed 1 field(s) as 2 atom(s)" in the boolean.complete status message.

checkpoints.name: phase8-frommesh
checkpoints.description: Union of libfive sphere (at -10,0,0) and BVH-procedural mesh sphere (at 10,0,0). Phase 8 should emit 2 atoms — tape sphere + atlasBaked mesh — not collapse to one dense bake.
